class.name: GKLocalPlayer
class.brief_description: Represents the signed-in Game Center player and exposes local-only APIs.

method.name: fetch_items_for_identity_verification_signature
method.description: Calls Apple's [code]fetchItems[/code] helper for server-side authentication. The callback receives [code](Dictionary data, Variant error)[/code]. The dictionary contains the [code]url[/code], [code]data[/code], [code]salt[/code], and [code]timestamp[/code] keys described in the inline Swift documentation, letting your backend verify the player's identity. If not null, [code]error[/code] contains a [code skip-lint]GKError[/code].

method.name: fetch_saved_games
method.description: Use this API to retrieve the list of saved games, upon completion, this method invokes the provided callback with both an array of GKSavedGame objects and a variant error, if not nil it contains a [code skip-lint]GKError[/code] describing the problem.

method.name: load_challengeable_friends
method.description: Loads players whom the local user can challenge. The callback receives [code](Array[GKPlayer] friends, Variant error)[/code] where either argument can be [code]null[/code]. If error is present, it is a [code skip-lint]GKError[/code].

method.name: load_default_leaderboard_identifier
method.description: Loads the local player's current default leaderboard identifier. The callback receives [code](Variant identifier, Variant error)[/code], where [code]identifier[/code] is a [code skip-lint]String[/code] or [code]null[/code], and [code]error[/code] is [code]null[/code] or a [code skip-lint]GKError[/code].

method.name: load_friends
method.description: Fetches the friends list. The callback receives [code](Array[GKPlayer] friends, Variant error)[/code]; a non-null error [code skip-lint]Variant[/code] holds the [code skip-lint]GKError[/code].

method.name: load_friends_authorization_status
method.description: Loads the authorization status for friend access. The callback receives [code](int status, Variant error)[/code], where [code]status[/code] is Apple's raw [code skip-lint]GKFriendsAuthorizationStatus[/code] value. Requires iOS 14.5, macOS 11.3, tvOS 14.5, or visionOS 1.0. Older versions return [code]0[/code] plus an [code skip-lint]apiNotAvailable[/code] error.

method.name: load_friends_with_identifiers
method.description: Loads friends that match the provided scoped player [param identifiers]. The callback receives [code](Array[GKPlayer] friends, Variant error)[/code], where [code]error[/code] is [code]null[/code] on success or a [code skip-lint]GKError[/code]. Requires iOS 14.5, macOS 11.3, tvOS 14.5, or visionOS 1.0. Older versions return an empty array plus an [code skip-lint]apiNotAvailable[/code] error.

method.name: load_recent_friends
method.description: Loads friends that recently played together with the local player. The callback signature matches [method load_challengeable_friends].

method.name: register_listener
method.description: Registers the local player listener to receive events like saved game conflicts. You typically call this in your [code]_ready()[/code] function.

method.name: resolve_conflicting_saved_games
method.description: Resolves conflicting saved games using the provided data. The [code skip-lint]conflicts[/code] array should contain the [GKSavedGame] objects that are in conflict (received from the [signal conflicting_saved_games]). The [code skip-lint]data[/code] is the correct game data to save. The callback receives [code](Array[GKSavedGame] saved_games, Variant error)[/code]. [code]error[/code] is a [code skip-lint]GKError[/code] if not null.

method.name: save_game_data
method.description: Saves the packed byte array as the game data with the specified name, upon completion the callback is invoked with both a GKSavedObject parameter and a Variant parameter for the error. The GKSavedObject is not-nil on success, and on error, the second parameter is not-nil and contains the [code skip-lint]GKError[/code].

method.name: set_default_leaderboard_identifier
method.description: Sets the local player's default leaderboard identifier to [param identifier]. The callback receives one argument: [code]error[/code], which is [code]null[/code] on success or a [code skip-lint]GKError[/code] on failure.

members.member: True when multiplayer is disabled by parental controls.
Indicates whether personalized communication is blocked for this account.

signal.name: challenge_completed
signal.description: Emitted when the local player completes a challenge issued by [code skip-lint]friend_player[/code].

signal.name: challenge_other_player_accepted
signal.description: Emitted when another player accepts a challenge that the local player issued.

signal.name: challenge_other_player_completed
signal.description: Emitted when [code skip-lint]friend_player[/code] completes a challenge issued by the local player.

signal.name: challenge_received
signal.description: Emitted when the local player receives a new challenge.

signal.name: conflicting_saved_games
signal.description: Emitted when there is a conflict between saved games. You should listen to this signal and then call [method resolve_conflicting_saved_games] with the chosen data.

signal.name: saved_game_modified
signal.description: Emitted when a saved game is modified.
